creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 212955
Proposed svn diff

Hello,

patch to update 0.5.5 -> 0.6.0

MASTER_SITES:
 
  - http://bundles.openttdcoop.org/ doesn't have 0.6.0 version

  - http://m1cro.me/ is unreachable

  - used https://cdn.openttd.org/opengfx-releases/0.6.0/opengfx-0.6.0-all.zip from https://www.openttd.org/downloads/opengfx-releases/latest.html

  - notice that distname have "-all" suffix, I used DISTNAMES because of that.

  - portlint OK

  - poudriere testport OK

  - opengfx-0.6.0 running OK with openttd-1.10.0 (not ported yet - https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=245253 )

Nuno Teixeira
